section_34_overview.section_reference: Section 34, Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016
section_34_overview.total_reservation: Not less than 4 percent of total number of vacancies in Government establishments.
section_34_overview.applicability: Applies to Government establishments as defined under Section 2(i).

category_wise_breakup.section_34_1_b: Deaf and Hard of Hearing – 1 percent
category_wise_breakup.section_34_1_c: Locomotor disability including cerebral palsy, leprosy cured, dwarfism, acid attack victims and muscular dystrophy – 1 percent
category_wise_breakup.section_34_1_d: Autism, intellectual disability, specific learning disability and mental illness – 1 percent
category_wise_breakup.section_34_1_e: Multiple disabilities including deafblindness – 1 percent (where applicable)

benchmark_condition.minimum_threshold: Not less than 40 percent certified disability.

interchange_rule.logic: If vacancy in a particular category cannot be filled due to non-availability of suitable person, it may be filled by interchange among the specified categories.
interchange_rule.objective: Ensures full utilization of 4 percent reservation.

carry_forward_rule.logic: Unfilled vacancies shall be carried forward to the succeeding recruitment year.
carry_forward_rule.limitation: Total reservation including carry forward shall not exceed prescribed ceiling.

post_identification_requirement.logic: Appropriate Government shall identify posts suitable for persons with disabilities.

promotion_dimension.note: Reservation in promotion subject to service rules and judicial interpretation.

legal_boundary_conditions: Reservation grouping does not alter statutory identity of disability.
